title: January 20th, 2022
body:
sin aesthetic

 lyrics

my right brain the baseline
left hand keep the same time
right hand is right quick
left brain is real slick
i exist in the middle
this what i gotta deal with
if i'm off just a little
i start to feel sick
i've never been centered
i've got the incentive
it's all unintended
i stall and i hesi
tate cuz i'm tenta
tive cuz i gotta
decide what it is
what it means
how to live
what to take
what to give
what to break
whatta break
what a break
this is great
i'm great
wait i hate
everything about this
can't wait to be out this
fixation tuh fix eything
i know i'm goin die
but i'm committed to gettin heaven
if i gotta give it my whole life
gift or a curse
god given...or not
it's so odd livin my life
i was not given my sight
i was born blind
and i kept livin
knew i didn't get it
cuz i kept trippin
know i'm not there yet
so i keep goin
eyes keep gettin stronger
so i keep im open
except when i close em to go to sleep
sometimes its real hard lettin go then just floatin
i feel the day in my body
every night
feel my life in my body
feel my light dying  behind me i lie in the dark
don't pray too often, it's always for sleep
i'm old enough to know what i need
sometimes
still not sure how to eat
sometimes
i'm sure i'm a de
mon when my hunger take over me
hear me comin, you'll see what i mean
my sin aesthetic is so it's own beat
you wanna get it gotta start with my feet
don't ask for my shoes yo
we ain't the same size
you cuh follow my tracks though
trust your own eyes
before you go you should know that i can't wait to talk when you get back
i did it all for the getdown we goin get to next time our paths pass in space time
that's why i'm drawin outside my lines
i'm drawn that way. i see people outside
i'm tryin talk to em
so they can talk to me
so we can talk about it
cuz if we can then it's real
the struggle is so fuckin real when i feel like i don't know what you're sayin
or vice versa
i call these my vice verses
the things that i'm stuck on
cuz i'm stuck on makin life perfect
quit lookin at the picture in the picture
this a picture of all the frames that i purchased
whatcha think of em
i throw out everything that don't fit em
call it my joy division
call outcha boy if you hate how i'm livin
i'm kiddin
if you start hearin about me that much
i'm already too far to touch
i'm sorry i didn't see it coming
do everything to prevent it
saw the sun and uh sen id
a message about how i wanted
to be like you when i grew up
keep what's mine when i'm on it
speak my mind when i wanted
shine a light on everything especially darkness
now i pray for shelter, shade from the thought of you
so tired sometimes i ain't got time fuh you
